meta.description: Machine-readable do/don't rules extracted from all component and foundation docs. Used by the validator agent to check generated code before staging.
meta.agent_rule: Run all rules with matching component_scope or scope=global against generated code. Severity=error blocks auto-merge. Severity=warning is flagged for human review.

rules.rule: All text must use sentence case
rules.detail: Labels, headlines, placeholders, error messages, button labels, tab labels, option list items — everything uses sentence case. Never title case or ALL CAPS.

rules.rule: Never use raw palette values — always use semantic tokens
rules.detail: dsBlue/500, #0F62FE etc. must never appear in component code. Only Action.*, Surface.*, Text.*, Border.*, Icon.* tokens.

rules.rule: One primary button per context
rules.detail: Never render more than one Button variant=primary in the same view, dialog, form, or section.

rules.rule: Do not disable the primary button when form is incomplete
rules.detail: Never use disabled state on primary button to indicate missing input. Show an Inline notification instead explaining what is needed.

rules.rule: Button sequence in top-placement contexts: primary rightmost
rules.detail: When actions appear at the top (page header, universal action bar), order right to left: primary → secondary → tertiary.

rules.rule: Close buttons are always tertiary icon buttons with close icon
rules.detail: The closing action in popovers, modals, side sheets, and similar overlays is always a tertiary icon button. Never a text button.

rules.rule: Border color and width tokens must match the same state
rules.detail: Border.Focused must pair with Border.Width.Focus. Border.Critical must pair with Border.Width.Critical. Never mix state tokens.

rules.rule: Nested elements must use a smaller border radius than their parent
rules.detail: Child components inside a container must have a smaller rx value than the container. Same radius flattens visual hierarchy.

rules.rule: No custom spacing values
rules.detail: All spacing must use Spacing.Component.* or Spacing.Layout.* tokens. No arbitrary pixel values.

rules.rule: Semantic icon/color/surface must come from the same variant group
rules.detail: Critical: Icon.Critical + Border.Critical + Surface.Critical. Warning: Icon.Warning + Border.Warning + Surface.Warning. Never mix e.g. warning icon with critical surface.

rules.rule: Never nest accordions
rules.detail: Do not place an accordion inside another accordion. Use separate accordions instead.

rules.rule: Accordion wrapped in container only when stand-alone
rules.detail: Use container wrapping only when accordion is placed directly on a page. When inside a side sheet, modal, or other container — no wrapping.

rules.rule: Use compact size in dense layouts
rules.detail: Use compact variant inside side sheets and modals. Do not use base size in dense contexts.

rules.rule: Initials must be exactly two letters
rules.detail: Always first name initial + last name initial. e.g. LH for Linda Hall. Never one letter or more than two.

rules.rule: Avatar is not interactive except for user menu trigger
rules.detail: Do not add click handlers to avatars for purposes other than opening the user menu.

rules.rule: Avoid avatar when image is unlikely to be available
rules.detail: For entities like patients where images are rarely available, avoid avatar component.

rules.rule: Only one banner at a time — never stack
rules.detail: Never show more than one banner simultaneously.

rules.rule: No custom icons or colors in banner
rules.detail: Only use the four provided variants. Do not introduce custom icons or colors.

rules.rule: Banner placement is above page content
rules.detail: Banners must be placed above page content or above the wizard top bar.

rules.rule: Use checkbox for non-exclusive multi-select only
rules.detail: For exclusive single-choice selection, use Radio button instead.

rules.rule: No commas or semicolons at end of checkbox labels
rules.detail: Checkbox labels must not end with punctuation.

rules.rule: Long labels wrap — never truncate
rules.detail: If a label is too long, allow it to wrap to a second line. Never truncate.

rules.rule: Illustration only — no icons or images in empty state
rules.detail: The visual element must be an illustration. Never an icon or photograph.

rules.rule: No technical jargon in empty state body
rules.detail: Body text must be plain, coherent, and solution-oriented.

rules.rule: Empty state should have a CTA action
rules.detail: Avoid leaving an empty state without an actionable next step for the user.

rules.rule: No fullscreen hero modal
rules.detail: Hero modal has no fullscreen variant. Do not attempt to make it fullscreen.

rules.rule: Use hero modal sparingly
rules.detail: Hero modals interrupt the user's workflow. Use only to introduce new features.

rules.rule: All list items must have consistent structure
rules.detail: All items must use the same leading element type (all icons, all images, or none). Do not mix.

rules.rule: All tiles in a gallery must consistently show or hide details
rules.detail: All tiles either show details (sublabel, actions) or none do. Never mixed.

rules.rule: Media tile only for graphical objects
rules.detail: Do not use for listing actions or non-visual content.

rules.rule: Multi-select option list must not have icons
rules.detail: In multi-select variant, no icons on items. Checkboxes are shown instead.

rules.rule: Actions variant option list: all items must have icons
rules.detail: If the list represents actions, every item must have an icon. No partial icon sets.

rules.rule: Max 3 actions in page header (1 on layout S)
rules.detail: No more than 3 action buttons. On layout S, maximum 1 button — others go in option list.

rules.rule: Status tags only on second-level page headers
rules.detail: Status tags are not allowed on top-level page headers.

rules.rule: Back button label must match parent page headline
rules.detail: The back button label on second-level pages must match the headline of the corresponding top-level page.

rules.rule: Only one popover at a time
rules.detail: Never show multiple popovers simultaneously.

rules.rule: Do not use popover for critical information
rules.detail: Use Modal or a notification component instead.

rules.rule: Radio button for exclusive single choice only
rules.detail: For multi-select, use Checkbox instead.

rules.rule: Radio button group: min 2, max 10 options
rules.detail: For more than 10 options, use Dropdown instead.

rules.rule: No commas or semicolons at end of radio labels
rules.detail: Labels must not end with punctuation.

rules.rule: Search field must always have placeholder text
rules.detail: Never leave the search field empty of placeholder text.

rules.rule: Show empty state when no search results
rules.detail: When no results match, always show the Empty state component.

rules.rule: Do not use search on small datasets
rules.detail: Do not add search to a small static list that does not benefit from filtering.

rules.rule: Segmented control: 2 to 5 segments only
rules.detail: Minimum 2, maximum 5 segments. Use Radio button or Dropdown for more.

rules.rule: All segments must be text-only or icon-only — never mixed
rules.detail: Never mix text and icon segments in the same segmented control.

rules.rule: Icon-only segmented control must have tooltips on every segment
rules.detail: When using icons, every segment requires a tooltip.

rules.rule: Centered slider requires symmetric range
rules.detail: Centered variant must have a symmetric range around zero e.g. -100 to 100.

rules.rule: No value label when input field is shown
rules.detail: When with_input_field=true, value_label must be set to never.

rules.rule: Do not use slider for very large or very small ranges
rules.detail: Avoid ranges like 1–1000 (too large) or 1–3 (too small). Discrete variant unsuitable for 2–3 intervals.

rules.rule: Switch label must not include on/off/enabled/disabled
rules.detail: The switch control itself communicates the state. Do not include state words in the label.

rules.rule: Switch is for activation only — not selection
rules.detail: For selecting from a list or indeterminate state, use Checkbox.

rules.rule: Icons must be consistent across all tabs in a group
rules.detail: Either all tabs have icons or none do. Never mixed.

rules.rule: Tab labels must never be truncated
rules.detail: If space is insufficient the tab group becomes scrollable.

rules.rule: Do not mark required fields with asterisk or required label
rules.detail: Only mark optional fields by appending (optional) to the label.

rules.rule: Error message replaces help text — never show both
rules.detail: On validation error, error message takes the place of help text.

rules.rule: Help text must not repeat the label
rules.detail: Help text adds new context — never restates the label or placeholder.

rules.rule: Do not use toast for critical blocking interactions
rules.detail: If user must immediately respond, use Alert dialog. Toasts are ephemeral and auto-dismiss.

rules.rule: Toast action labels must be descriptive — not OK or Cancel
rules.detail: Action labels must clearly describe what happens e.g. Delete, Keep.

rules.rule: No custom icons or colors in toast
rules.detail: Only use the four provided variants.

rules.rule: Do not add top bar or page header to layouts that already contain one
rules.detail: Layout templates already include these components. Adding a second is a duplication error.
